steps.title: Identify the antecedent
steps.content: The blank pronoun refers to "the eating utensils," which is plural. The pronoun appears in the clause "he considered ______ dangerous and unnecessary luxury items." The task is to find a pronoun that agrees in number with this plural antecedent.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice by number agreement
steps.content:
• Choice A — them: plural object pronoun; agrees with the plural antecedent "the eating utensils." ✓
  • Choice B — this: singular demonstrative pronoun; does not agree with a plural antecedent. ✗
  • Choice C — that: singular demonstrative pronoun; does not agree with a plural antecedent. ✗
  • Choice D — it: singular pronoun; does not agree with a plural antecedent. ✗
That is the correct answer.
